selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw: {"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the potential sources of false information and take steps to verify the accuracy of what you see online. This can involve fact-checking and cross-referencing information from multiple sources to get a more complete picture of any given issue. Additionally, using AI-powered tools that are designed to detect and flag fake content can help to identify and remove false information from your social media feeds. However, it is important to remember that no single solution will completely eliminate the problem of fake content on social media, so a multi-faceted approach is necessary.","reasoning_summary":"Using AI-powered tools to detect and flag fake content, fact-checking information from multiple sources, and being aware of potential sources of false information are all important steps in managing and dealing with fake content on social media. ","tone":"informative","citations":["<source name or org>"]}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is essential to be aware of the potential sources of false information and take steps to verify the accuracy of what you see online. This can involve fact-checking and cross-referencing information from multiple sources to get a more complete picture of any given issue. Additionally, using AI-powered tools that are designed to detect and flag fake content can help to identify and remove false information from your social media feeds. However, it is important to remember that no single solution will completely eliminate the problem of fake content on social media, so a multi-faceted approach is necessary.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Using AI-powered tools to detect and flag fake content, fact-checking information from multiple sources, and being aware of potential sources of false information are all important steps in managing and dealing with fake content on social media.
